seriess.title: Large Bank Consumer Credit Card Balances: Net Charge-Off Rate
seriess.notes:
The annualized net charge-off rate for all credit card accounts. Net charge-offs refer to the three-month sum of gross charge-offs less recoveries. The annualized net charge-off rate is calculated as four times the total quarterly net charge-offs divided by the three-month average for total outstanding credit card balances. 

For more detail see the methodology (https://sc103-philfed-prod-cm.sitecore-prod-ase4.appserviceenvironment.net/surveys-and-data/y14-methodology).
